title: Non-record: AWQ 2xH100 proxy no-compile quantized eval
author: Devchandrasen

data.description: Environment-gated no-compile path for quantized evaluation to bypass a torch.compile crash after decompression

novel_contributions: 2xH100 proxy run of the AWQ + GPTQ stack
Environment-gated no-compile quantized evaluation path to avoid torch.compile crash
Successful reload and evaluation of an under-16MB artifact on the local HPC setup
Non-record evidence submission for the 16MB track
